tags.name: `mc-radio`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display a radio with optional labels, hints, and error messages.
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: Forms, Surveys, User preferences
When not to use: Decorative purposes, Non-interactive elements
Works with components: mc-radio-group, mc-card, mc-modal, mc-drawer, mc-notification
Alternative component names: Radio Button, Option Button, Selection Button

Events:

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired when mc-radio is clicked.

  * `change` {`CustomEvent<boolean>`} - Fired when mc-radio in checked/unckecked.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-radio is focused.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when mc-radio is going out of focus.

  * `input` {`CustomEvent<string | boolean | unknown[] | null>`} - 

Slots:

  * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-radio.

Attributes:

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the radio.

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - Sets radio in the `readonly` state.

  * `tabindex` {`number`} - Sets the `tabindex` attribute.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets radio in the `disabled` state.

  * `name` {`string | undefined`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element.

  * `value` {`string`} - Pass the value for the input if it is used inside a `form` element.

  * `checked` {`boolean`} - Gets the state of the radio.

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

Properties:

  * `_selectionController` - 

  * `_checked` {`boolean`} - 

  * `focused` {`boolean`} - 

  * `input` {`HTMLInputElement | null | undefined`} - 

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the radio.

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - Sets radio in the `readonly` state.

  * `tabindex` {`number`} - Sets the `tabindex` attribute.

  * `focus` - Sets the focus to the radio.

  * `click` - Clicks the radio.

  * `blur` - Sets focus out

  * `change` - Change the radio.

  * `changeHandler` - Handler that is called when the radio checked state changes.
It is used to update the state of the radio when it is clicked.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets radio in the `disabled` state.

  * `_onMouseDown` - 

  * `name` {`string | undefined`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element.

  * `value` {`string`} - Pass the value for the input if it is used inside a `form` element.

  * `checked` {`boolean`} - Gets the state of the radio.

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `hiddenInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - 

  * `controlType` {`string`} - 

  * `isCheckable` {`boolean`} - 

  * `inputType` {`string`} -

attributes.description:
`label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.

Property: label

then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

Default: false
